news.indexSubtitle: Briefly about what is changing in the platform and how teams use Taska in their work.
news.analytics-dashboards.title: Dashboards for managers: sections by departments and periods
news.analytics-dashboards.excerpt: Dashboards for revenue, tasks and funnel - to open one screen instead of ten tables during a planning meeting.
news.analytics-dashboards.p1: We have strengthened the analytics unit: now it is easier to compare periods, look at the contributions of departments and identify delays in tasks without manually compiling reports.
news.analytics-dashboards.p2: For networks and holdings, it is important to see both the overall picture and the point-by-point detail. New cross-sections help the owner and operating director speak on the same data.
news.analytics-dashboards.p3: Reports can be used at weekly meetings: record agreements and immediately translate them into tasks in the same loop.
news.analytics-dashboards.p4: If you need custom metrics for your industry, leave a request, we will tell you how best to integrate dashboards into your processes.
news.weekly-plans-meetings.title: Weekly plans and protocols: less chaos at planning meetings
news.weekly-plans-meetings.excerpt: How to collect input from employees in advance and document the results of the meeting in minutes with tasks.
news.weekly-plans-meetings.p1: Teams that implement a regular planning rhythm are quicker to align expectations across departments. Fixing a plan before the meeting saves hours of discussion.
news.weekly-plans-meetings.p2: A departmental protocol helps you avoid losing decisions: what to do, who is responsible and by when. This is especially useful when staffing is growing and there are multiple sites.
news.weekly-plans-meetings.p3: In Taska, this scenario is combined with tasks, processes and rights: the manager sees the summary, the performers see their instructions without unnecessary chats.
news.weekly-plans-meetings.p4: Tell us about the format of your meetings - we will select a template to suit your organizational structure.
news.telegram-automation.title: Telegram and tasks: notifications without losing context
news.telegram-automation.excerpt: Reminders about deadlines and statuses in the usual messenger - linked to transactions and projects in Taska.
news.telegram-automation.p1: Integration with Telegram remains one of the most requested scenarios: employees receive signals where they already work, and the data remains in the system.
news.telegram-automation.p2: We recommend combining the bot with clear roles in Taska: this way notifications get to the right people and don’t turn into noise.
news.telegram-automation.p3: Escalation scenarios are available to managers: overdue or critical status may automatically require a response.
news.telegram-automation.p4: In the demo we will show typical chains for your sales department or operating system.
